SECURITY MANAGEMENT software and door control hardware are your business's first line of defense when it comes to loss prevention.
Starr Telecom offers the Infinias access control system, which makes access control easy.
Simply install one controller locally at each door and connect it to the nearest Power over Ethernet switch with a single Cat-/ cable.
Add doors anywhere your network goes, making it easy and cost effective to build a system one door at a time.
Combine the door controller with our access management software to create a highly scalable solution that can be deployed within one building, or across multiple locations around the world.

We provide a number of outdoor stages or hire services.
Covered in stages are essential if your event is outside, given the weather we have!
We can meet you at the location the stage is to go and we can assess the site, discuss your needs and find a solution that works for you.
Our outdoor stage can come with audio and lighting or you can supply your own.
We also offer crowd safety barriers (also known as mojo barriers).
We supply our trailer stage options all over the country for many types of events.
We have sizes to choose from depending on your budget and the nature of your event.
Performance area is m x .m, and for bigger events you can add on the extended PA wings giving you a m stage frontage.
These are ideal for larger events and ideal for branding.
We can also offer drum kit and keyboard risers with all our stages.
If you are a performer or band who likes to interact with their audience, we can provide a ramp going into the crowd.
Just ask for details.
We have a wide range of outdoor stage hire & crowd control solutions available.
However, with every turnkey product and as every event hire is different, sometimes flexible staging solutions are required.
Our stage platforms give you complete flexibility in your choice of stage size and height.
Choose an open air or a covered option, single level or tiered option with wheelchair ramps.

m² stage area with various height ground support.

This provides the ideal solution for various applications.

Major life transitions can be stressful, scary, or devastating.
Have you experienced one of these major life transitions?
These life transitions are the difficult realities of life - change is inevitable and major changes like these rock our world, emotionally and psychologically.
We work hard to achieve success, stability, and security.
Just when we think we've arrived, that things are going well and we have some balance in life, a major life transition can result in emotional turmoil and mental confusion.
Life transitions can be very challenging, and they're often an opportunity for personal growth and development.
Change and major life transitions are inevitable.
Our counseling and therapy staff specialize in supporting and guiding people through these difficult and challenging experiences.

Analysis from the TUC has found zero-hour workers do double the night shifts and are paid on average £ an hour less than other workers.
Trade Unions are campaigning on the issue throughout 'HeartUnions' week.
Union leaders will commit to negotiate an end to zero-hour contracts in workplaces where they have recognition.
An online petition has also been launched in an effort to build public support for a ban.
The most recent official figures show that across East Midlands, there are people whose main job is a zero-hour contract.
Despite that, a TUC poll found that that two-thirds of zero-hour workers prefer to be on permanent, secure contracts.

The Vance Charter girls' basketball team raced out to a huge first-quarter lead and never looked back in its - victory against Roxboro Community School Friday in Henderson.
The Bulldogs dipped to - overall and - overall with two regular season games remaining following Tuesday night's meeting with Oxford Prep.
Results from the RCS-Oxford Prep contest were unavailable at press time.
Mackenzie Oliver paced the Bulldogs against Vance Charter with points and four steals.
Oliver hit -of- free throws for the game.
Georgia Carver chipped in five points, while Nyah Daye added four.
Paige Melton scored two points and pulled down three rebounds while Madison Dunkley finished with two points and four boards.
Trinity Cheek scored two points and Zoe Russell rounded out the scoring with one point.
RCS entered Tuesday's home finale tied with Voyager Academy for fourth place in the North Central Athletic Conference and the two will meet next week.
Conference-leader Vance Charter raced out to a - first quarter advantage against RCS Friday and led by double digits for the remainder of the game.
The Knights are - and a perfect - in the NCAC.
They are th in this week's MaxPreps Adjusted Ranking released Monday by the North Carolina High School Athletic Association.
RCS will travel to Henderson Collegiate tonight.
Game time is set for p.m.
The Roxboro Community School boys' basketball extended its winning streak to five with an - rout of Vance Charter Friday in Henderson.
The Bulldogs evened their record at - heading into Tuesday's home finale against Oxford Prep.
Jalen Bailey led a balanced scoring attack with points and nine rebounds, while point guard Nasir Stokes finished with points and assists.
Dylan Jones poured in points, while J.R. Paylor added points and rebounds.
Bryson Pleasant pulled down rebounds to go along with nine points, while Karson McKenzie came off the bench and finished with seven points.
Jaylen Pointer and Thomas Humphries finished with two points each.

Are you looking for a Face Painter for birthday parties in London?
Or perhaps you're holding a corporate event or school celebration with face painting?
Whatever your party requirements, we can provide the entertainment you need.
Our Face Painters are all set for children's party events, big and small!
Face Painting is a delightful way to create special memories at your kids party.
Imagination comes to life as children see themselves transformed into their favourite animal, character, and dazzling designs are created on smiling faces.
The best moment is when they see their painted faces for the first time in the mirror - they beam with big smiles and delight!

Enjoy color changing dancing water with this innovative fountain.
Not only does the water dance and shimmer above the surface but a dramatic light show also is projected on your pool's bottom.
The light and fountain show is battery operated so there are no hose hook ups to restrict movement.
The unit can be tethered or it will float freely around your pool.
Water flow into the fountain causes the unit to spin, creating an even better light show.
The Ultra Underwater Light & Fountain Show is the perfect pool party accessory!
This units larger size gives an even better show than it's smaller version.
Unit requires (D) batteries.
The Ultra model measures ." in diameter by ." high.

Jan Erik has served several years as an advisor to the Norwegian Prime Minister, as a state secretary to the prime minister, advisor in Parliament and as a political consultant.
He has also background as executive editor for A-pressen and as Managing director for Tidens Krav.
Now acting as owner and senior advisor at Kruse Larsen AS.
Jan Erik is known for his skills in strategic communications and public relations.
She has long experience from business strategy and business development.
She has worked as special advisor, consultant, and latest CEO for Navitas.
She is now working as communications advisor for Shell.
Ingrid Sara holds a Masters degree in International corporate management.
Thomas Christian has an extensive career within the oil&gas and finance industry, including years of experiance as as corporate advisor and board member for various companies.
Thomas Cristian holds a civil engineer degree from NTH.
Victor is CEO and owner of Abyss Group and chairman of the board in both Abyss Aqua and Abyss Subsea.
His main experience is from the Royal Norwegian Air Force, Umoe Sterkoder and Noomas/Abyss Group, as well as several board positions.
Victor is educated from the Royal Norwegian Air force Academy and holds a bachelor degree in economy and mathematics from UIO.
